---
title: "Machine Learning"
---

**Hearing Things — AED Hallucination Investigation**

- [Part 1: Where Do AED Hallucinations Come From?](aed-hallucination-probe.qmd) --- Linear probing reveals the encoder builds a near-perfect latent representation of speech/non-speech from layer 0
- [Part 2: Causal Intervention](aed-hallucination-intervention.qmd) --- Activation steering confirms the probe direction is causally upstream of the decoder, suppressing ~50% of hallucinations
- [Part 3: The Decoder Knows Too](aed-hallucination-decoder.qmd) --- Probing the decoder during generation: 99% recall, 99% precision, errors are labelling noise

**GPT Adventures**

- [GPT Adventures](gpt-adventures/index.qmd) --- Building a GPT-2 Small from scratch and progressively optimising it
- [A Neural Net From Scratch](neural-net-from-scratch.qmd)
- [Corneal Endothelium Image Processing](corneal-endothelium.qmd)
- [Image Generation with GANs](gans.qmd)
- [Better GANs - Gradient Penalisation](better-gans.qmd)
